canonical_name: the marshy shores of the lake which now bore no trace of the dragon which once had lurked there
many fortified places in that countryside
wife of King Uriens of North Wales
the innocent victim of my magic
a sorceress in the heathen lands-
the granddaughter of the greatest of priestesses
someone very small peering out at me from behind a tree
one of the Old People of the hills
the Old People of the hills
men who live in villages and farms
the best of the Christian priests
little ones like you, who can do no sin
